description: Generates a report about a specific URL.
name: vt-private-get-url-report

outputs.description: URL address URL.Malicious.Vendor For malicious URLs, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the reason that the vendor made the decision DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The indicator type DBotScore.Vendor Vendor used to calculate the score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The actual score URL.VirusTotal.Resolutions.ip_address IPs that resolved to this URL
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: Resolve date of IPs that resolved to this URL URL.VirusTotal.ResponseContentSHA256 SHA256 hash of the response content
outputs.name: URL.VirusTotal.Resolutions.last_resolved

outputs.description: The response headers URL.VirusTotal.Scans.Source Scan vendor for this URL
outputs.name: URL.VirusTotal.ResponseHeaders

outputs.description: Scan detection for this URL (True/False) URL.VirusTotal.Scans.Result Scan result for this URL - signature, etc.
outputs.name: URL.VirusTotal.Scans.Detected
